ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the individual lived */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (Male, Female) */,
  "race" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the individual (Free, Slave) */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "birth_state" TEXT /* State of birth */,
  "month_died" TEXT /* Month of death */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "cause_of_death" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of death */,
  "days_ill" INTEGER /* Number of days the individual was ill before death */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Exact birth date */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Exact death date */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner (if the individual was a slave) */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family record */,
  "health_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on health conditions */,
  "source_document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source document for data provenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_cause_of_death FOREIGN KEY ("cause_of_death") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_source_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_document_id") REFERENCES source_documents ("source_document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Approximate population of the county in the given year */,
  "economy_type" TEXT /* Type of economy (e.g., agricultural, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of the record */,
  "historical_events" TEXT /* Significant historical events in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* More detailed ethnicity within the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "status_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "spouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spouse (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the occupation belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death */,
  "disease_category" TEXT /* Category of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the owner */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the owner lived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "head_of_family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_documents" (
  "source_document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source document */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "archive_location" TEXT /* Location of the document in the archive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_document_id")
)
